title: anthyllis rubra
intro: Anthyllis rubra, also known as kidney vetch, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family and is native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Anthyllis rubra include its ability to improve kidney function, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of menopause and arthritis. Anthyllis rubra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
